scored_niches.notes: 3.19M hiking community. AllTrails logs hikes and tracks stats. Komoot has badge collections. Gap: no app purely gamifies the daily hiking SKILL habit (navigation study, terrain reading, gear knowledge drills) with XP/streak separate from tracking physical activity.

2.88M Linux community. Mimo/SoloLearn have streak systems with some Linux content. Gap: no app purely gamifies the daily Linux CLI SKILL habit (one command mastery, one shell script drill, one sysadmin scenario) with XP/streak — power users want depth, not beginner courses.

2.4M baking community. King Arthur and Yummly track recipes, The Bake App has partial habit elements. Gap: no app purely gamifies the daily pastry SKILL habit (one new technique drill, one lamination rep, one decoration challenge) with full XP/streak for serious home bakers.

2M coffee community. Scale apps track brew ratios. No app gamifies the daily coffee SKILL habit (one extraction dial-in, one tasting calibration, one latte art practice rep) with streak/XP — coffee enthusiasts are data-obsessed and already tracking every gram.

1.39M sourdough/bread community. Apps are timers and calculators. No app gamifies the daily baking practice habit (one shaping session, one hydration experiment, one scoring technique) with streak/XP — a community already obsessively tracking fermentation times would love gamification.

1.38M foraging/mycology community. iNaturalist logs observations. Shroomify and PictureThis identify species. No app gamifies the daily foraging practice habit (one new plant ID study, one habitat walk log, one preservation technique) with streak/XP — safety-conscious community hungry for education.

1.22M birding community. Merlin identifies species daily, eBird tracks life lists. Gap: no app purely gamifies the daily birding SKILL habit (one new ID drill, one call recognition study, one behavior observation log) with XP/streak for intermediate birders.

1.21M embroidery/cross-stitch community. Pattern Keeper tracks project progress. No app gamifies the daily practice habit (one new stitch technique, 30-min daily session, skill level progression) with streak/XP for fiber arts practitioners.

1.16M watercolor/painting community. Apps are digital painting canvases. No app gamifies the daily watercolor practice habit (one master study, one color mixing drill, one wet-on-wet technique rep) with streak/XP for developing artists.

1M climbing community. 27Crags/Mountain Project track sends. Crimpd has training plans. No app gamifies the daily climbing HABIT (fingerboard session, movement drill, crimp strength rep log) with streak/XP — climbers are data-obsessed and underserved.

740K pottery/ceramics community. Apps are kiln trackers and glaze calculators. No app gamifies the daily pottery practice habit (wheel centering drills, wall thickness reps, new form study) with streak/XP — passionate but unserved niche.

680K Docker/DevOps community. Management UIs and reference docs dominate. No app gamifies the daily Docker/DevOps skill habit (one container build scenario, one networking drill, one Kubernetes concept) with streak/XP for self-taught developers leveling up.

620K calligraphy/handwriting community. Apps are tracing templates and digital pens. No app gamifies the daily calligraphy habit (one alphabet page, one new letterform, one script style progression) with streak/XP for lettering artists.

610K vim/neovim community. Apps are editor ports and SSH clients. No app gamifies the daily Vim mastery habit (one motion drill, one macro study, one plugin workflow rep) with streak/XP — developers who use Vim daily are extremely passionate and would pay for this.

550K SQL community. Mimo and SoloLearn have SQL with streak systems. Gap: both are beginners-focused with lesson pipelines — no app purely gamifies daily SQL PRACTICE drills (one complex JOIN scenario, one optimization challenge, one window function exercise) with XP for intermediate-advanced learners.
